chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANO Cr. Misc. Appln. No. S-190 of 2023 Date Orders with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on M.A No. 2692/2023. (Exemption Application) 3. For hearing of main case. 24-02-2025 Mr. Pardeep Kumar B. Butani, advocate for the applicant Mr. Nazir Ahmed Bhangwar, D.P.G.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Learned counsel for the applicant does not press instant criminal misc. application on the pretext that whereabouts of the alleged detainee are not known. Besides a case bearing Crime No. 22/2018 has been registered at Police Station Airport Jacobabad, in which accused Ahmed Ali and two others have been convicted by the court of Additional Sessions Judge-2, Jacobabad. Accordingly, instant criminal misc. application is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Judge Abdul Salam/P.A ****
